tasks.label: Compare Output vs Golden
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem -Path '${input:vendorTestOutput}' -File | ForEach-Object { $golden = Join-Path '${input:vendorTestGolden}' $_.Name; if (!(Test-Path $golden)) { Write-Warning "NO GOLDEN: $($_.Name)" } elseif (Compare-Object (Get-Content $_ -Raw) (Get-Content $golden -Raw)) { Write-Warning "DIFF: $($_.Name)"; code --diff $golden $_.FullName } else { Write-Host "OK: $($_.Name)" -ForegroundColor Green } }
